content.query:
-- Run this connected to 'master' on the -ondemand endpoint
CREATE DATABASE reporting_views
    COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2_UTF8;  -- recommended for parquet/delta



USE reporting_views;
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [juror_lake] WITH 
(	LOCATION = N'https://baubaisadfsastg.blob.core.windows.net/'
);
GO


CREATE OR ALTER VIEW dbo.vw_quarantine_files AS
WITH raw AS (
    SELECT
        r.filepath()  AS full_path,
        r.filepath(1) AS date_folder_path,
        TRY_CAST(BulkColumn AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS json_content
    FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'juror-etl/quarantine/*/*.json',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'juror_lake',
        FORMAT      = 'CSV',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
        FIELDQUOTE      = '0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR   = '0x0b'
    ) WITH (BulkColumn NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS r
    WHERE r.filepath() NOT LIKE '%_placeholder%'
),
parsed AS (
    SELECT
        full_path,
        date_folder_path,
        json_content,
        -- quarantine_metadata
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.quarantine_metadata.quarantined_at')       AS quarantined_at,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.quarantine_metadata.quarantine_layer')      AS quarantine_layer,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.quarantine_metadata.reason_code')           AS error_message,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.quarantine_metadata.reason_description')    AS error_description,
        -- source
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.date_folder')                        AS date_folder,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.la_folder')                          AS la_folder,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.la_code')                            AS la_code,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.la_name')                            AS la_name,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.file_name')                          AS file_name,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.file_type')                          AS file_type,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.extract_type')                       AS extract_type,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.extract_timestamp')                  AS extract_timestamp,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.source.relative_path')                      AS relative_path,
        -- processing_status
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.processing_status.moved_to_quarantine')     AS moved_to_quarantine,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.processing_status.downstream_processed')    AS downstream_processed,
        -- schema_validation
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.schema_validation.expected_schema')         AS expected_schema,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.schema_validation.validation_result')        AS validation_result,
        JSON_VALUE(json_content, '$.schema_validation.details')                  AS validation_details
    FROM raw
    WHERE json_content IS NOT NULL
      AND json_content != ''
)
SELECT
    full_path,
    -- Use JSON values with fallback to path-based parsing if JSON is missing
    COALESCE(date_folder, date_folder_path)                                     AS date_folder,
    COALESCE(la_name, 'unknown')                                                AS la_name,
    COALESCE(la_code, 'unknown')                                                AS la_code,
    COALESCE(la_folder, 'unknown')                                              AS la_folder,
    COALESCE(
        error_message,
        CASE
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%file_empty_header_only%' THEN 'file_empty_header_only'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%file_empty%'             THEN 'file_empty'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%file_unreadable%'        THEN 'file_unreadable'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%non_standard_la_code%'   THEN 'non_standard_la_code'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%missing_folder_parts%'   THEN 'missing_folder_parts'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%invalid_la_code_la_data%' THEN 'invalid_la_code_la_data'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%invalid_la_code_format%' THEN 'invalid_la_code_format'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%low_confidence_structure%' THEN 'low_confidence_structure'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%file_corrupted%'         THEN 'file_corrupted'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%file_too_large%'         THEN 'file_too_large'
            WHEN full_path LIKE '%incorrect_schema%'       THEN 'incorrect_schema'
            ELSE 'unknown_error'
        END
    )                                                                           AS error_message,
    COALESCE(error_description, '')                                             AS error_description,
    COALESCE(quarantine_layer, 'L0')                                            AS quarantine_layer,
    TRY_CAST(quarantined_at AS DATETIME2)                                       AS quarantined_at,
    COALESCE(file_name, '')                                                     AS file_name,
    COALESCE(file_type, '')                                                     AS file_type,
    COALESCE(extract_type, '')                                                  AS extract_type,
    COALESCE(extract_timestamp, '')                                             AS extract_timestamp,
    COALESCE(relative_path, '')                                                 AS relative_path,
    CAST(moved_to_quarantine AS BIT)                                            AS moved_to_quarantine,
    CAST(downstream_processed AS BIT)                                           AS downstream_processed,
    COALESCE(expected_schema, '')                                            AS expected_schema,
        COALESCE(validation_result, '')                                          AS validation_result,
        COALESCE(validation_details, '')                                         AS validation_details
FROM parsed;  -- hide the keepalive

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW dbo.vw_voters_dedup_agg AS
SELECT
    creation_date,
    rec_num,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM Database1.dbo.voters_deduplicated_delta
WHERE AdtclmnRecordActiveInd = 1
GROUP BY creation_date, rec_num;

--create view for inggested files L0 view
CREATE OR ALTER VIEW dbo.vw_ingested_files AS
WITH raw AS (
    SELECT r.BulkColumn AS json_doc
    FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'juror-etl/L0_process_log/processed_files_log.json',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'juror_lake',
        FORMAT      = 'CSV',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
        FIELDQUOTE      = '0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR   = '0x0b'
    ) WITH (BulkColumn VARCHAR(MAX)) AS r
),
parsed AS (
    SELECT j.file_path, j.processed_at
    FROM raw
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(json_doc, '$.processed_files')
        WITH (
            file_path    VARCHAR(1000) '$.file_path',
            processed_at VARCHAR(40)   '$.processed_at'
        ) AS j
    WHERE json_doc LIKE '%"processed_files"%'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT j.file_path, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(40))
    FROM raw
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(json_doc)
        WITH (file_path VARCHAR(1000) '$.file') AS j
    WHERE json_doc NOT LIKE '%"processed_files"%'
),
split AS (
    SELECT
        file_path,
        processed_at,
        -- Filename: after the last /
        RIGHT(file_path, CHARINDEX('/', REVERSE(file_path)) - 1) AS file_name,
        -- Path up to (not including) the filename
        LEFT(file_path, LEN(file_path) - CHARINDEX('/', REVERSE(file_path))) AS parent_path
    FROM parsed
    WHERE file_path IS NOT NULL
),
split2 AS (
    SELECT
        file_path,
        file_name,
        processed_at,
        parent_path,
        -- LA folder: last segment of parent_path
        RIGHT(parent_path, CHARINDEX('/', REVERSE(parent_path)) - 1) AS la_folder,
        -- Grandparent path (strip the LA folder)
        LEFT(parent_path, LEN(parent_path) - CHARINDEX('/', REVERSE(parent_path))) AS gp_path
    FROM split
)
SELECT
    file_path,
    file_name,
    la_folder,
    -- Date folder: last segment of grandparent_path
    RIGHT(gp_path, CHARINDEX('/', REVERSE(gp_path)) - 1) AS date_folder,
    TRY_CAST(processed_at AS datetime2) AS processed_at
FROM split2;
